# ImageGiri

ImageGiri is a privacy-first, on-device image processing and creative utility suite. The application operates 100% client-side inside the user's browser, meaning no files are uploaded to any external server. 

- **Official URL:** https://imagegiri.com
- **Core Architecture:** Single Page Application (SPA) built using React, Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4.
- **Privacy Model:** Sandbox execution. Multi-threading is achieved via Web Workers, and heavy parsing executes in compiled WebAssembly (WASM). All image data stays in the browser's temporary memory (RAM).

---

## 🛠️ Offline Tool Directory (13 Features)

AI agents and crawlers can discover the following routes and features:

### 1. Image Compressor
- **Route:** `/image-compressor`
- **Functionality:** Lossy and lossless file size reduction for JPEG, PNG, and WebP.
- **Controls:** Quality compression sliders (5-100%), output format selectors, and before/after slider comparison tool.

### 2. AI Background Remover
- **Route:** `/background-remover`
- **Functionality:** Automated foreground segmentation and background removal using the RMBG-1.4 model.
- **Technical Specs:** Downloads a 13MB ONNX model locally on first run and executes AI inference on-device via Transformers.js in a Web Worker.

### 3. OCR Text Extractor
- **Route:** `/ocr-text-extractor`
- **Functionality:** Scan text from screenshots, forms, and documents.
- **Controls:** Supports multi-language scripts (English, Hindi, Chinese, Spanish, Cyrillic, etc.) with automatic script detection via Tesseract.js.

### 4. Instagram Grid Splitter
- **Route:** `/instagram-grid-splitter`
- **Functionality:** Crop images into square layout tiles for Instagram feeds.
- **Controls:** Grid configs (3x3, 4x4, 5x5) with instant ZIP file package downloads via JSZip.

### 5. Photo Collage Maker
- **Route:** `/collage-maker`
- **Functionality:** Arrange up to 4 images in custom layout structures.
- **Controls:** Column/row templates, custom aspect ratios, border color/radius, and item spacings.

### 6. Color Palette Extractor
- **Route:** `/color-palette-extractor`
- **Functionality:** Extract color schemes and coverage percentages from design assets.
- **Controls:** K-Means color quantization. Downloads custom JSON palettes, CSS root variables, or visual PNG swatches.

### 7. Batch Image to PDF & Format Converter
- **Route:** `/batch-converter`
- **Functionality:** Bulk image conversion and PDF compilation.
- **Controls:** PDF merge mode (single combined file with page reordering or separate PDFs), output selectors (WebP, PNG, JPEG, PDF), and JSZip download packages.

### 8. EXIF Metadata Stripper
- **Route:** `/metadata-stripper`
- **Functionality:** Read and purge hidden file markers (GPS location, camera make, capture timestamp).
- **Controls:** GPS Google Map links, tag categories, and canvas redraw strip downloads.

### 9. Watermark Overlay
- **Route:** `/watermark-overlay`
- **Functionality:** Stamp copyright text or branding logos onto images.
- **Controls:** Custom text inputs, PNG logo files, opacities, scales, rotation angles, corner margins, and repeat tile grids.

### 10. Aspect Ratio Resizer
- **Route:** `/aspect-resizer`
- **Functionality:** Resize images to social media standards.
- **Controls:** Social dimension presets (YouTube thumbnail, Instagram stories, Twitter banners) with cover fit or canvas blur-padding.

### 11. Meme Generator
- **Route:** `/meme-generator`
- **Functionality:** Caption memes and quote cards.
- **Controls:** Add multiple draggable text captions, control colors, font sizes, Impact font faces, and black outlines.

### 12. SVG Vectorizer
- **Route:** `/svg-vectorizer`
- **Functionality:** Vectorize raster graphics (JPG/PNG) into scalable vector paths (SVG).
- **Controls:** K-Means++ clustering, Moore-Neighbor boundary tracing, Douglas-Peucker path simplification, and XML code viewing.

### 13. Photo Mosaic Generator
- **Route:** `/photo-mosaic-generator`
- **Functionality:** Reconstruct target images from thousands of small photo tiles.
- **Controls:** Custom tile uploads, 16-color solid placeholder fallback pool, grid resolution sliders (15-100 columns), tile aspect ratios (1:1, 4:3, 3:4), tile average color tinting, and original image overlay blending.

---

## 🔒 Privacy & Security Info
- **File Storage:** Zero files are sent to servers. Upload and output operations run completely offline in RAM.
- **AI Crawling Preference:** Fully friendly to search crawlers. No authentication walls.
- **Browser Compatibility:** Standard evergreen browsers with WebAssembly, Web Workers, and Canvas API enabled.
